programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round of 32: France vs Sweden
programme.desc: France take on Sweden looking to continue their pursuit of another World Cup title. Sweden have shown they can compete with the best and will be determined to stand in France's way. The winner advances to the Round of 16.

programme.title: Matahari
programme.desc: Fauzi seorang guru yang telah dihantar untuk berkhidmat di Sabah. Di sana dia telah berkenalan dengan seorang novelis yang sedang mengalami masalah ‘writer’s block’ iaitu Yazid.

programme.title: Meniti Cinta Di Starimost

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Putus Cinta

programme.title: Fight Stars - Women's MMA - EP46

programme.title: Fight Stars - Ronda Rousey - EP4
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the greatest champions of combat sports, in particular Ronda Rousey and her former training partner Kayla Harrison. Plus, discover the boxing pros who made themselves known by winning an Olympic medal.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Gina Carano - EP5

programme.title: Foul Play - Sun Yang - EP17

programme.title: Star Block Workout - Best of Brazil - EP18

The Secret Lab Kids have to stop the replicant before it turns the whole lab into a stinky, sticky fungus-farm. / When Kent manages to contact aliens, they land at the Edison complex and demand that the Secret Lab kids help them find a very valuable "treasure" that their planet needs. The trouble is, they don't know the earth word for this treasure - sending our kids scrambling to solve this mystery before they get turned into "shrablitz”!

From mental health to trauma, from body image to family dynamics, the series encouraged thousands to acknowledge issues they were taught to hide.

Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Detox
programme.desc: Feel light, clean, and energized with Kinohimitsu Detox, specially curated for TWS by experts— a trio of Bio-Booster, Detox Enzyme, and Footox. Boost nutrient absorption, ease digestion, and flush out toxins naturally. Ease the constipation and cleansing your body, easy for you to create a daily routine for total wellness. Kinohimitsu 轻盈排毒组专家专为TWS精心打造的轻盈排毒组，让您感觉轻盈、洁净、充满活力——它包含Bio-Booster、Detox Enzyme 和Footox 3项好评排毒保健品。有助于促进营养吸收，促进消化，并自然排出毒素。缓解便秘，净化身体，让您轻松建立维护全面健康的日常习惯。

programme.title: The Black Panther

programme.title: Racun Menantu
programme.desc: After marrying Zain, Sara lived in the same house with Pak Dolah, her father-in-law. Because of the family's grudge, Sara started making trouble by seducing her own father-in-law.

programme.title: Cupid
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang ejen yang bekerja di sebuah syarikat penghancur jodoh yang ditugaskan untuk memikat seorang wanita supaya dapat melupakan suaminya yang telah diisytiharkan meninggal dunia. Namun dia jatuh cinta pada wanita tersebut

programme.title: Luar Biasa
programme.desc: Kisah yang diinspirasikan daripada pemenang pingat emas Paralimpik, Mohamad Ridzuan yang menghadapi penyakit 'Cebral Palsy' dan abangnya yang sentiasa ada di sisinya.

programme.title: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Balapan
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang remaja yang telah menjadi musuh sejak sekian lama di lapangan balapan acara pecut 100meter peringkat daerah Selangor dan akhirnya menjadi sahabat seperjuangan.

programme.title: Lampu Merah
programme.desc: Si lelaki sukakan si perempuan, tanpa sedar yang si perempuan itu psiko dan obses dengan cintanya. Cara untuk selamatkan diri hanya dengan jatuh cinta dengan si perempuan semula.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Tebus
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Mikail telah di culik dan untuk menyelamatkan anaknya dia cuba mengimbau kembali sejarah lampau dirinya ketika menyertai kumpulan gangster.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung
programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap. Dilakonkan oleh Kamal Adli dan Nabila Huda.

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep21 - EP121
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Pilot - EP101
programme.desc: When a mother loses control of her baby stroller, the Shaq Paq works together to return her baby safe and sound.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep4 - EP4
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Communication - EP116
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover the value and importance of communication. We will learn the correct ways to communicate and the main rules of the good listener. We will know in which sites we can raise our voice and when we should respect the silence of others. We will talk about rumours and how harmful they are for effective communication.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Dignity - EP117
programme.desc: In this episode we will discover the value of dignity, finding that it goes hand in hand with self-love and self-esteem. We must value ourselves and respect ourselves first and then others. Being respectful is a rule to be able to live in harmony and dignity. It takes dignity to ask for forgiveness and to forgive!

programme.title: Mellodees - Jack & Jill - EP11
programme.desc: Fetch a pail of water with Dee to keep his little fish happy at home.

programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from illegally running a detergent factory in Australia.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Daredevil Gronk - EP117
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq helps Gronk get ready for the big debut with his daredevil hero, Cuckoo Carlos.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Fungal Bungle / Water Friends For? - EP114
programme.desc: Kent’s extreme attempts to cure his toe fungus in time for a pool party cause the fungus to mutate and grow into a fungus-based replica of Kent himself. The Secret Lab Kids have to stop the replicant before it turns the whole lab into a stinky, sticky fungus-farm. / When Kent manages to contact aliens, they land at the Edison complex and demand that the Secret Lab kids help them find a very valuable "treasure" that their planet needs. The trouble is, they don't know the earth word for this treasure - sending our kids scrambling to solve this mystery before they get turned into "shrablitz”!
